qa.user_verbatim_complaint: MICRO fix: parameterize hardcoded flock timeout constants in two scripts that were flagged by the style inspector as Standard 2/9 violations (introduced_in_diff: true) blocking close of task 20260525-050824.

out_of_scope_observations.observation: score-inject.sh has additional uncommitted changes (Disgraced rank handling for negative scores, reason field append in recent_events) from prior task 20260525-050824, confirmed by git show 9d68a38 (auto-bulk commit that introduced these changes). These changes are NOT part of this MICRO fix and were already in the working tree before baseline SHA 867042b. MICRO fix flock hunk is clean and isolated.

score-update.sh has uncommitted changes from prior task 20260525-050824 (uncapped delta, Disgraced rank, comment doc update). close-report-20260525-050824.md confirms score-update.sh:76-77 is a pre-existing false positive (provision alpha). None of this is from the MICRO fix.

spec_section_updates.section_4: Cycle 20260526-042454 (MICRO): Both scripts verified parameterized. scripts/score-inject.sh line 63: LOCK_TIMEOUT="${LOCK_TIMEOUT:-10}"; flock call at line 65: flock -s -w "${LOCK_TIMEOUT}" 8; stderr at line 66: within ${LOCK_TIMEOUT}s. scripts/lifecycle-baseline-import.sh line 49: LOCK_TIMEOUT="${LOCK_TIMEOUT:-10}"; flock call at line 53: flock -w "${LOCK_TIMEOUT}" 9; stderr at line 54: within ${LOCK_TIMEOUT}s. bash -n exits 0 for both. No bare flock -w 10 literal in either target script. All 4 ACs pass.

qa.complaint_resolution_evidence: grep -F 'flock -s -w "${LOCK_TIMEOUT}" 8' scripts/score-inject.sh returns exit 0 (match found). grep -F 'flock -w "${LOCK_TIMEOUT}" 9' scripts/lifecycle-baseline-import.sh returns exit 0. grep 'flock.*-w 10' on both target scripts returns exit 1 (no matches). Both Standard 2/9 violations eliminated.

complaint_element_pointer.how_located: direct file content match; confirmed via git diff against baseline SHA 867042b

qa.overall_assessment: PASS. All 4 acceptance criteria verified with direct bash/grep evidence. MICRO fix adds LOCK_TIMEOUT="${LOCK_TIMEOUT:-10}" declaration before flock calls in both target scripts, replaces bare integer 10 with the variable, and updates adjacent stderr messages. Exact env-override form as mandated. Declaration precedes flock call in both files (score-inject.sh: decl L63 < flock L65; lifecycle-baseline-import.sh: decl L49 < flock L53). bash -n exits 0 for both. Codex finding 1 (scope evidence wording) addressed: flock-related hunks are the exact MICRO fix; additional uncommitted changes in score-inject.sh and score-update.sh are attributed to prior task 20260525-050824 with git evidence (commit 9d68a38 + close-report artifact).

qa._success_criteria_rule: All 3 items in requirements_decomposition verified. 4 ACs verified.

root_cause_verification.rationale: The bare integer 10 literals at score-inject.sh:64 and lifecycle-baseline-import.sh:52 (pre-fix line numbers) are replaced with "${LOCK_TIMEOUT}" (double-quoted). LOCK_TIMEOUT is assigned using env-override form LOCK_TIMEOUT="${LOCK_TIMEOUT:-10}" immediately before each flock call. Default value is unchanged (10), so no regression risk. Standard 2/9 violations eliminated.

build_verification.build_output_summary: Both scripts exit 0 with no stderr. bash -n syntax check passes for score-inject.sh and lifecycle-baseline-import.sh.
build_verification.skip_reason: Non-UI, non-deployed shell scripts. Syntax verification is the applicable build check.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex raised 3 findings with PROPOSED_FIX and 1 OBSERVATION_ONLY. Finding 1: scope evidence wording overclaimed diff size (exact per-file lines). Finding 2: prior-task attribution for score-update.sh and non-flock score-inject.sh hunks needed explicit artifact citation. Finding 3: grep commands using double-quoted ${LOCK_TIMEOUT} patterns could be shell-expanded; suggested grep -F. OBSERVATION_ONLY (finding 4): implementation itself is AC-compliant, no requirement-scoped blocker.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Finding 1 addressed: report now distinguishes flock-related hunks (the MICRO fix) from additional pre-existing dirty state. Finding 2 addressed: prior-task attribution documented with git show 9d68a38 evidence (auto-bulk commit) and docs/dev/close-report-20260525-050824.md reference. Finding 3 addressed: re-ran critical positive-assertion greps with grep -F; all pass (exit 0). Verdict unchanged: PASS.
